input.query: Assess whether we can onboard a UAE healthcare analytics vendor using patient data, Microsoft 365, and cross-border cloud processing.

documents.title: Draft data processing addendum
documents.summary: Draft DPA describes patient-data processing, UAE hosting preference, subprocessor disclosure, and breach notification, but final signature is pending.

documents.title: Security controls summary
documents.summary: Vendor reports SSO, MFA, access logs, annual penetration testing, and ISO 27001 certification.
